paragraphs.text: Abba Leontios of the community of our holy father Theadosios® told us: Alter the new lavriotes were driven out of the New Lavra* Abba Polychronios the priest told us that he had heard from Abba 1 went and took up residence in the same Javra. One Sunday I went Constantine, who was higoumen of the New Lavra of Holy Mary to the church to make my communion and when I went in, I saw the Mother of God,* that one of the brethren died in the hospital an angel standing at the right side of the altar. When I had received at Jericho.® They brought him back to The Towers to bury him <communion> I went back to my cell and a voice came to me there and from the moment they left the hospital until they arrived saying: ‘From the moment that altar was consecrated I was al The Towers, a star travelled with them and never ceased shining commanded to remain here’. * over the dead brother until they laid him in the earth.
